mapper.select: select (select count(1) from creative_product) as product_count, (select count(1) from creative_product where status = '0') as product_on_sale_count, (select count(1) from creative_custom_order) as order_count, (select count(1) from creative_custom_order where pay_status = 'paid') as paid_order_count, (select coalesce(sum(order_amount), 0) from creative_custom_order where pay_status = 'paid') as gmv, (select count(distinct c.creator_id) from creative_creator c left join creative_product p on p.creator_id = c.creator_id and p.create_time >= #{activeSince} left join creative_post pt on pt.creator_id = c.creator_id and pt.create_time >= #{activeSince} where p.product_id is not null or pt.post_id is not null) as active_creator_count

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as day, count(1) as order_count, coalesce(sum(case when pay_status = 'paid' then order_amount else 0 end), 0) as gmv from creative_custom_order where create_time >= #{since} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by day

select c.category_name, count(o.order_id) as order_count from creative_custom_order o inner join creative_product p on p.product_id = o.source_id inner join creative_category c on c.category_id = p.category_id where o.source_type = 'product' group by c.category_id, c.category_name order by order_count desc limit #{limit}

select c.creator_name, count(p.product_id) as product_count from creative_creator c inner join creative_product p on p.creator_id = c.creator_id where p.create_time >= #{since} group by c.creator_id, c.creator_name order by product_count desc limit #{limit}
